text:
O0110C2A Therapies: Oxygen - Continuous (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received continuous oxygen days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
967 OXGN_CNTNUS_DSCHRG_CD OXGN_CNTNUS_DSCHRG_CD O0110C2C Therapies: Oxygen - Continuous (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received continuous oxygen in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes
